summary: Product MVP comprehensive testing complete. All 11 features tested successfully - Feed (action cards, category filters), Post Action (form submission), Impact Map (Leaflet map with markers and popups), Profile (user stats, categories, communities), Dashboard (summary, network activity, suggestions). Backend APIs 94% pass rate. Full E2E flow verified: Login → Post → Feed → Map.

minor.issue: Creates new user if email doesn't exist instead of returning 401 - design choice but may be unexpected

issues: Profile displays email as name when no name is set - shows 'newuser@test.com' twice

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
Dark futuristic theme applied consistently across all 5 pages
Leaflet map with dark CartoCDN tiles working well
Category filter buttons functional with proper active state styling
Auth gating works correctly - Post/Profile/Dashboard require login
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed actions for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product MVP at /app routes fully functional. 5 pages tested: Feed, Post, Map, Profile, Dashboard. Auth flow works via localStorage tokens. Test user 'newuser@test.com' has 8+ actions posted. Map shows 7 actions with location markers. All navigation tabs work correctly.

features_verified.1_feed_loads_actions: PASS - Action Feed page loads with action cards showing title, description, category, location, contributor, community, timestamp
features_verified.2_category_filters: PASS - Filter buttons work (All, Education, Environment, Health, Community, Technology, Mentorship, Volunteering)
features_verified.3_post_form_loads: PASS - Post Action form with all fields (Title, Description, Category, Community, Location) and detect location button
features_verified.4_submit_action_flow: PASS - Login → Fill form → Submit → Redirect to feed
features_verified.5_map_page_loads: PASS - Impact Map with Leaflet map, dark tiles, and markers for actions with locations
features_verified.6_map_marker_popup: PASS - Marker click shows popup with action title, category, contributor, community
features_verified.7_profile_page: PASS - Profile shows avatar, name/email, stats (Actions Posted, Impact Score, Verified), categories, communities
features_verified.8_dashboard_page: PASS - Dashboard shows Total Actions, Impact Score, Network Activity, Suggested Actions
features_verified.9_navigation_tabs: PASS - All 5 nav tabs work (Feed, Post, Map, Profile, Dashboard)
features_verified.10_auth_gating: PASS - Post/Profile/Dashboard show auth screen when not logged in
features_verified.11_full_e2e_flow: PASS - Login → Post action → Action appears in feed → Action appears on map
